title: UK, France agree three-year deal to stop migrant crossings
summary_full: Under the deal, France pledged to increase law enforcement on the coast by more than half to fight irregular migration to Britain – reaching 1,400 officers by 2029
summary_public: Under the deal, France pledged to increase law enforcement on the coast by more than half to fight irregular migration to Britain – reaching 1,400 officers by 2029

FR.label: neutral
FR.evidence: France pledged to increase law enforcement on the coast
